name: Bahrain
summary: Day 59 Sunday. BAHRAIN IN CUMULATIVE DAMAGE ENVELOPE; INDIA-EVACUATION INCLUDES BAHRAIN; IRAQI-MILITIA ARCHITECTURE UPGRADED. WSJ Iraq-attribution architecture upgraded April 26: April 12 Saudi MoFA protest summons of Iraqi ambassador now CONFIRMED (House of Saud, Defense News); Bahrain among targets named for Iraqi-militia drone attacks (per WSJ + ISW, named militias Kataib Hezbollah + Asaib Ahl al-Haq). Indian repatriations ~50K total since Feb 28 include Bahrain among repatriating countries (per Tribune India / India.com). Bahrain absent from Iran's mediator-network (Pakistan + Oman + Russia per Araghchi tour). Cumulative damage envelope intact: 5th Fleet HQ, Bapco, ALBA (19% offline), Batelco/AWS, King Fahd Causeway still closed. Day 14 of blockade: no Iranian kinetic vs Bahrain-bound vessels. Sporadic Iraqi-militia drone attacks continue.

historical_summaries.summary: 1 signals. Iranian strikes targeted US Navy 5th Fleet HQ in Manama and Crowne Plaza Hotel

3 signals. Bahrain's Bapco declared force majeure after waves of Iranian strikes targeted energy installations | Air raid sirens activated across Bahrain early Sunday March 29 | IRGC struck ALBA aluminum plant (world's largest smelter) — 2 mildly injured, damage assessed

9 signals. IRGC missiles hit Batelco telecommunications facility in Hamala, Bahrain on April 1 — the facility hosts Amazon Web Services infrastructure | IRGC struck Batelco telecommunications facility in Hamala, Bahrain on April 1 — hosts AWS cloud infrastructure, servers rendered 'partly ino | CONFIRMED: Bahrain's Bapco Energies oil storage tank hit by Iranian drone attack on April 5
